Ex-Parte Hearing On Plaintiffs' Application For Tro And Osc Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jan-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge John K. Stewart, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Reporter Susan Crozier #4167. (318)

APPEARANCES:
Sarah D. Youngblood, Jean L. Bertrand, and Alex P. Catalona of Schiff Hardin LLP (415-901-8700) appearing on behalf of plaintiffs.
Noah S. Rosenthal and David J. Reis of Howard Rice Nemerovski Canady Falk & Rabkin (415-434-1600) appearing on behalf of defendants.

The court, court personnel and counsel are present in open court. Court and counsel confer on the factual issues of the case and on the merits of plaintiffs' application. Having heard argument from counsel, the court DENIES the plaintiffs' application.

Court and counsel discuss the trial schedule and the submission of paperwork to the court. Mediation is to take place on January 30, 2007. The next hearing date is set for January 31, 2007 at 2:30 p.m. for plaintiffs' (1) Motion for Preliminary Injunction and (2) Motion for Summary Adjudication.
